name: Bill Weld
subject: ballot access
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21jleZuXV0z7FKJwfL63H0fAdWHzSGNE5yg9-Vg4qs9rfIwiY0sT2e_bXBGYJ2UT7E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191122_fr_s&n=1) Team — We’re trying to get on the Republican primary ballot in all 50 states and we need your help. Some state parties are going to extreme lengths to make it difficult for anyone to challenge Trump. For example: The Republican Party of Florida has decided that in order for a candidate to appear on the presidential primary ballot, **they must pay $25,000 to the state party.** If you ask me, $25,000 is outrageous, but if we’re going to get on the ballot everywhere, then we need to make sure we’ve got the money.That’s why I’m asking you to make a contribution to our Ballot Access Fund. I am absolutely committed to making sure voters in every state have a real choice in next year's primary, and I am counting on supporters like you to help me do just that.**** [**Can you rush a donation today to help us make it happen?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21jleZuXV0z7FKJwfL63H0fAdWHzSGNE5yg9-Vg4qs9rfIwiY0sT2e_bXBGYJ2UT7E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191122_fr_s&n=2) | | [CHIP IN:
BALLOT ACCESS FUND ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21jleZuXV0z7FKJwfL63H0fAdWHzSGNE5yg9-Vg4qs9rfIwiY0sT2e_bXBGYJ2UT7E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191122_fr_s&n=3)
---
Thanks,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191122_fr_s&n=4).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191122_fr_s&n=5) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191122_fr_s&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191122_fr_s&n=7), software for leaders.

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: falling short of victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team: If we don't reach our goal this week, we could risk falling short of victory in the primary. The early funds we can raise now will be critical for winning on Primary Day, and Ed is counting on you.

_**[Will you pitch in $27 or more and help us raise $25,000 before midnight?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112219_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward:
* * *

> Team,
>
> We're coming up on our end-of-week deadline, and right now, we're only 63% of the way to raising $25,000.
>
> We need to hit every goal to keep Ed in the fights on the issues that matter most to the people of Massachusetts and across the country.
>
> _**[Will you chip in $27 or more to stand with Ed?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112219_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> From the Green New Deal to gun safety to reproductive freedom to immigrant rights and economic inequality -- Ed is leading the charge to move progress forward.
>
> But if we fall short of our goals, we could risk falling short of victory in the primary.
>
> The early funds we can raise now will be critical for winning, and Ed is counting on you.
>
> _**[Will you stand with Ed and help us reach this week's fundraising goal by pitching in $27 or more today?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112219_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Cory Booker
subject: Asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, here's an update on the December debate stage: **FIRST:** The DNC raised the threshold to qualify for the December debate -- each candidate must have 200,000 individual donors _and_ hit 4% in at least four polls, or 6% in two polls, to secure their spot on stage. **THEN:** During Wednesday night's debate, we had more people donate to our campaign for the first time than any other day of this campaign -- including the day we launched -- and as of yesterday morning, _**we officially surpassed the 200,000 individual donor threshold.**_ **NOW:** The one thing left to do -- get the polls we need to qualify for the December debate. And we only have a few weeks left to do it. Our teams on the ground are working hard to reach more folks in the early states to get the polling numbers we need, but they can't do it alone. **Will you chip in to support our efforts and make sure this week 's debate isn't my last?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191122_CB_20191122-fr-CB-decdebate-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

name: Gary Peters
subject: reaching out with an update on my campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
| | |
---
Friends,

My opponent just announced he broke fundraising records thanks to Donald Trump helping funnel $3 MILLION into Michigan to defeat me, buy this seat and expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate.

That's why I'm asking for your help - but before I do, I'd like to explain why it's so important we defend Michigan's Democratic Senate seat.
Losing here would mean throwing away our only chance of Democrats taking back the Senate. That means two more years of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington. That means he and Donald Trump will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court, and you can bet they'll keep trying to dismantle protections for those with preexisting conditions.
**Our race here in Michigan will decide control of the Senate.** I've won tough races before, and I know we can do it again. But polling shows me tied with my opponent, and analysts at Roll Call rank me as one of the most targeted Democratic senators in the country.
**The good news is Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats can flip the Senate - but that can only happen if we first win in Michigan.**

So with the future of the Senate on the line, in a race this close, every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing. **That's why a group of committed donors - for the first time _ever_ in our campaign - are triple matching all donations, but only until midnight.**
With $6,100 left to raise, I'm counting on you if we're going to win here in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats. **With just a few hours until midnight, I'd really appreciate your support. Even just $3 (becomes $9) would go a long way to help us win.**

Here's the best link to donate - whatever you give will go toward keeping Michigan blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa9b/5721a3ed/71f3cbee/efa9c46/3315113414/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNDEtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk141-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
I can't thank you enough for all you do. If we keep fighting hard, together, we will win.

Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa9b/5721a3ed/71f3cbee/efa9c45/3315113414/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa9b/5721a3ed/71f3cbee/efa9c44/3315113414/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa9b/5721a3ed/71f3cbee/efa9c43/3315113414/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa9b/5721a3ed/71f3cbee/efa9c42/3315113414/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa9b/5721a3ed/71f3cbee/efa9c45/3315113414/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa9b/5721a3ed/71f3cbee/efa9c44/3315113414/VEsB/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: The Foreign Service’s Finest Hour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Rwu4B9AaPdQlkcZehkmMhEgwjfR3aj1B-nam0oiX7Oc=/Iviqwh_b27Yw_gyzvcvOkSRjyggyFsfzvU3rqI_yyuw=?recurring=auto&refcode=20191123email)
---
Team, Two years ago, I resigned my commission as a US Foreign Service Officer to run for Congress, because I saw hyper-partisanship tearing our country apart and I could not in good conscience continue to serve in this administration This week, I was prouder than I have ever been to have served as an FSO. In dramatic impeachment hearings on Capitol Hill, we have seen career Foreign Service Officers -- Ambassador Masha Yovanovitch, George Kent, Jennifer Williams, David Holmes -- demonstrate patriotism, professionalism, and integrity in the face of tough questioning from both sides of the aisle and unprecedented personal attacks from the President. **This is what public service is truly about and should always be: country over party.** In her hearing, Ambassador Yovanovitch said, "we are people who repeatedly uproot our lives, who risk and sometimes give our lives for this country...I count myself lucky to be a Foreign Service Officer and fortunate to serve with the best America has to offer." I couldn't agree more. Quite simply, Foreign Service Officers pride themselves in being willing to sacrifice their own interests for our country's, not the other way around. **At this critical moment, we need more public servants in Washington, and fewer politicians. That 's why I am so proud to be one of only two Foreign Service Officers in the country currently running for Congress. **If you believe we need that spirit in Washington right now, we need your help. | [**_Help send another Foreign Service Officer to Washington by making a contribution now!_ **](https://act.myngp.com/el/Rwu4B9AaPdQlkcZehkmMhEgwjfR3aj1B-nam0oiX7Oc=/Iviqwh_b27Yw_gyzvcvOkSRjyggyFsfzvU3rqI_yyuw=?recurring=auto&refcode=20191123email)
---
| | **[DONATE NOW ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/Rwu4B9AaPdQlkcZehkmMhEgwjfR3aj1B-nam0oiX7Oc=/Iviqwh_b27Yw_gyzvcvOkSRjyggyFsfzvU3rqI_yyuw=?recurring=auto&refcode=20191123email)**
---
**As a Foreign Service Officer, I made a vow to serve and protect the Constitution. I plan to keep that vow while serving in the US Congress, and to always remain #ForeignServiceProud.**
Thank you for standing with me, standing with our Foreign Service Officers, and standing up for our democracy when it is under threat.
Sincerely,
Sri Preston Kulkarni
| **[DONATE NOW ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/Rwu4B9AaPdQlkcZehkmMhEgwjfR3aj1B-nam0oiX7Oc=/Iviqwh_b27Yw_gyzvcvOkSRjyggyFsfzvU3rqI_yyuw=?recurring=auto&refcode=20191123email)**
---

clean_body: Now President Trump wants to know what YOU think. | | | | | | | | | Friend, The Impeachment Witch Hunt is now OVER. There was NO QUID PRO QUO. There was NO BRIBERY. President Trump did NOTHING WRONG. It's so obvious that these baseless hearings were a botched attempt by the Democrats to take down the Republican Party and your President. They wasted your time and your hard-earned taxpayer dollars on a 3-year Witch Hunt only to FAIL. How pathetic. President Trump knows the Do Nothing Democrats and Fake News media won't ever tell the facts about him and his Administration, and that's why he wants to know what a few respected Republican leaders, like YOU, think. Instead of asking 84 MILLION registered Republicans across the Nation, he asked us to personally reach out to a small group of his most loyal supporters in each county to take our Official Post-Impeachment Hearing Poll. | YOUR answers will represent the views of EVERY Republican who lives in your zip code. SUPPORTER: REGISTRATION NUMBER: 6124335 - 2019 POLL RESPONSE:**PENDING DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT ************************************************************ ******** Attention: Please take the poll NOW to tell President Trump what you think: Since the day President Trump took office, the Democrats' only goal has been to undo the election. Their only real agenda item has been IMPEACHMENT. That's why YOUR response is so critical. We're going to publish our results so that the entire world can see that AMERICA STANDS WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP. He'll be reviewing ALL RESPONSES first thing tomorrow morning. Don't let him down. ** Thank you, Team Trump 2020 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: You're Ahead of the Curve!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/SP7ouGstNULQUE5fAqyC0SxN3VGfhb7ODW7chyp7VXc=/aYNKPDyVivu_mrfRs35KErMfy1VJyS1sBqFcUkWnLeo=)

Dear Supporter,
We want a fair, balanced, and transparent race where all candidates are held accountable to verify and validate their statements and platforms. I am committed to transparency and accountability to the citizens of North Carolina and challenge all candidates to adhere to the same standard.

I am encouraged by your continued support for me to be the next United States Senator from North Carolina. The congressional hearings and news of this past week exposed the negative impacts of pay-to-play and quid-pro-quo politics. It is now up to US to restore honor and dignity to the US Senate. I am in this race, and I have developed my detailed platform, specifically because I believe I am the best candidate to unseat Thom Tillis. I commit to serve with transparency, accountability, honor, and dignity for the benefit of all North Carolinians.
The** One of US for All of US Campaign** rolls into the weekend. Thank you so much for supporting our mission and volunteering to assist. [**Every contribution **](https://act.myngp.com/el/SP7ouGstNULQUE5fAqyC0SxN3VGfhb7ODW7chyp7VXc=/aYNKPDyVivu_mrfRs35KErMfy1VJyS1sBqFcUkWnLeo=)you make helps to spread our message to voters across the great State of North Carolina..

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/SP7ouGstNULQUE5fAqyC0SxN3VGfhb7ODW7chyp7VXc=/aYNKPDyVivu_mrfRs35KErMfy1VJyS1sBqFcUkWnLeo=)

[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/SP7ouGstNULQUE5fAqyC0SxN3VGfhb7ODW7chyp7VXc=/aYNKPDyVivu_mrfRs35KErMfy1VJyS1sBqFcUkWnLeo=)
{{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}}
{{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}}
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/SP7ouGstNULQUE5fAqyC0SxN3VGfhb7ODW7chyp7VXc=/l-P__b9s1W7xeEssTHw35OyRsza_0_3nEeDY6knB0jk=).

The congressional hearings and news of this past week exposed the negative impacts of pay-to-play and quid-pro-quo politics. It is now up to US to restore honor and dignity to the US Senate. I am in this race, and I have developed my detailed platform, specifically because I believe I am the best candidate to unseat Thom Tillis. I commit to serve with transparency, accountability, honor, and dignity for the benefit of all North Carolinians. The One of US for All of US Campaign rolls into the weekend. Thank you so much for supporting our mission and volunteering to assist. make helps to spread our message to voters across the great State of North Carolina.. = = {{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}} {{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}} If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: [Staff] Thompson HQ
subject: we have to be ready
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter -- We wanted to make sure you saw this call to action from Mike. The road to the 2020 election won't be easy, but we know our grassroots movement has the strength to take on the challenges to come. [**Can you pitch in $10 to help Mike ensure Democrats have the resources to go the distance? -> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/m5YlUZwRCSmQTZI11TUhsm8qMXcAVf5Tk2-ZU4qlrM8=/mJ8EtwvuJsrIqXSt-nljuRLW_DTV-j2RHjx_R9j7Cg0=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191122&amount=25) Begin Forwarded Message: Peter - 2020 is coming up fast, and we're facing the most consequential election of our lifetime.

National Republicans and their shady big-money backers are already spending big in competitive House races across the country to take back the majority. But Peter: we won't let them win.

We're facing a critical fundraising deadline, so we must ensure that Democrats have the resources to go toe-to-toe with the GOP. ******[Donate $150 now](https://act.myngp.com/el/m5YlUZwRCSmQTZI11TUhsm8qMXcAVf5Tk2-ZU4qlrM8=/VLHcDb_zZZVh_sWuW_GayqGTydH9c177ny2dufhEPTg=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191122&amount=150)******

******[Other amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/m5YlUZwRCSmQTZI11TUhsm8qMXcAVf5Tk2-ZU4qlrM8=/VLHcDb_zZZVh_sWuW_GayqGTydH9c177ny2dufhEPTg=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191122)****** With less than a year until the election, we can't afford to slow down.

name: Campaign Update (via MarkWarnerVA.com)
subject: Derek, we're asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
One of Mark's GOP opponents, former Congressman Scott Taylor, just unveiled a big slate of endorsements. With two former members of Congress and a number of General Assembly members now backing Taylor
|
---
| | Derek,

One of Mark's GOP opponents, former Congressman Scott Taylor, just unveiled a big slate of endorsements. With two former members of Congress and a number of General Assembly members now backing Taylor, his campaign is claiming "incredible momentum" to help "defeat Senator Mark Warner."

**This is a big development in the fight to keep Virginia blue in 2020, and we have to fight back. Will you rush a donation to help Mark's rapid response efforts?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d788/53d9897e/53c61b99/1c89e97f/1016042663/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191123nd__355__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d788/53d9897e/53c61b99/1c89e97a/1016042663/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fight?refcode=20191123nd__355__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** Make no mistake: re-electing Mark and beating Donald Trump in Virginia is going to be a tough fight. Mark won his last re-election by less than 1%, and we're going to have to work even harder to win in 2020.

That's because the Trump campaign has been investing in a Virginia ground operation that will boost turnout for Mark's eventual opponent. If we're going to turn out Virginia Democrats in the numbers we'll need to build on our General Assembly victories, re-elect Mark, and beat Donald Trump, we'll need all hands on deck.

**That's why we're asking for your help. Between Scott Taylor's latest endorsements and the Trump campaign's turnout operation, it's clear we need to step up our efforts.[Will you donate today to help Mark fight back?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d788/53d9897e/53c61b99/1c89e979/1016042663/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fight?refcode=20191123nd__355__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thanks for all you do, Derek. This is going to be a tough campaign, and we know Mark really appreciates your strong support. Let's keep up the fight.

-- Team Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d788/53d9897e/53c61b99/1c89e978/1016042663/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fight?refcode=20191123nd__355__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

name: MJ Hegar
subject: next week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
One of the things I'll be thinking about next week is how thankful I am for the more than 21,000 grassroots supporters who have helped make this campaign a reality.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909a8/7f51f7bc/4b88ebd7/4ef09cb4/3994047411/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Happy Saturday, Peter!

Next week is Thanksgiving, and I'm looking forward to quality time and good food with my family. But even though most people won't be paying attention to their email (which is a good thing!), we still have to hit our November goal. That's why my team is setting a challenge of raising $20,000 of our $58,852 November total before Thanksgiving. Can you help?

One of the things I'll be thinking about next week is how thankful I am for the **more than 21,000 supporters** who have pitched in to make this campaign as strong as it is. I know that every member of this team makes tough decisions about how to spend their hard-earned money, so I'm grateful for every cent you're able to send our way.

Thanks to you, I'm proud to say that nine out of 10 donations to this campaign are under $100. With your strong grassroots support, we've already traveled more than 8,000 miles and talked with thousands of Texans about the issues facing their families. **[But I still need your help to keep going.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909a8/7f51f7bc/4b88ebd7/4ef09cab/3994047411/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=email_20191123.1nd__533__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Folks on the campaign trail keep telling me that they're fed up with the corruption in Washington. They're tired of senators who put special interests and D.C. bosses ahead of their families, and they're looking for someone who will fight for ALL of us.

**I 'm ready to be that fighter -- but if we're going to win this election, we have to meet all of our fundraising goals. So Peter, please make a donation now to help us reach our $20,000 Pre-Thanksgiving Goal and defeat Senator Cornyn:** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909a8/7f51f7bc/4b88ebd7/4ef09caf/3994047411/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191123.1nd__533__&amount=50")**

name: Cory Booker
subject: Let's do something incredible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| _We 're setting a big end-of-month goal of $1.5 million, and we won't hit it without your help. Read about our new goal below and then, **[please consider chipping in a few dollars to help us get there.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191123_CB_20191123-fr-CB-EOM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Friend, in a moment, I'm going to ask you to donate to my campaign. I know we reach out for your support often -- and trust me, we know that you can't give every single time we ask. But, we have a huge goal to hit in the next week -- and I don't think we'll get there without your help. As I write to you, I'm still in awe of what we accomplished in these past few days. As soon as I walked backstage from Wednesday night's debate, my team told me that donations were coming in at a record pace. It wasn't long before we would receive donations from all 50 states as well as D.C. and Puerto Rico. That's not all: **We raised more money online in that _first hour_ after I had left the stage than we had raised in our _best online fundraising day of the entire campaign._** Since then, we officially reached the DNC donor threshold with over 200,000 individual donors for the December debate -- a truly amazing accomplishment for an underdog campaign like ours. I'm so thankful to this team for helping hit this milestone. At a critical moment in our campaign, tens of thousands of people stepped up -- many of whom donated for the very first time. When we looked at the numbers yesterday morning, it turns out we had raised $770,000 in the span of just two days! **Now, I want to see if we can make it all the way to one-and-a-half million dollars before we close the books on this month. That 's right. $1,500,000 by 11:59 p.m. on Sunday, November 30th.** It won't be easy. November can be a very difficult month for fundraising. But after this week, I have all the faith in the world that this team can pull together to reach this ambitious goal. And in the spirit of radical transparency, we'll be keeping you updated on our progress along the way. **[Are you with me? Donate $5 today to help us hit our big $1.5 million goal.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191123_CB_20191123-fr-CB-EOM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We are moving full speed ahead and bringing in the resources we'll need to take this campaign across the finish line. If we've proven anything this week, it's that our underdog campaign has a lot of fight left in it. Now let's go do something incredible. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191123_CB_20191123-fr-CB-EOM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---

clean_body: | | | | We 're setting a big end-of-month goal of $1.5 million, and we won't hit it without your help. Read about our new goal below and then, "=" Friend, in a moment, I'm going to ask you to donate to my campaign. I know we reach out for your support often -- and trust me, we know that you can't give every single time we ask. But, we have a huge goal to hit in the next week -- and I don't think we'll get there without your help. As I write to you, I'm still in awe of what we accomplished in these past few days. As soon as I walked backstage from Wednesday night's debate, my team told me that donations were coming in at a record pace. It wasn't long before we would receive donations from all 50 states as well as D.C. and Puerto Rico. That's not all: We raised more money online in that first hour after I had left the stage than we had raised in our best online fundraising day of the entire campaign. Since then, we officially reached the DNC donor threshold with over 200,000 individual donors for the December debate -- a truly amazing accomplishment for an underdog campaign like ours. I'm so thankful to this team for helping hit this milestone. At a critical moment in our campaign, tens of thousands of people stepped up -- many of whom donated for the very first time. When we looked at the numbers yesterday morning, it turns out we had raised $770,000 in the span of just two days! Now, I want to see if we can make it all the way to one-and-a-half million dollars before we close the books on this month. That 's right. $1,500,000 by 11:59 p.m. on Sunday, November 30th. It won't be easy. November can be a very difficult month for fundraising. But after this week, I have all the faith in the world that this team can pull together to reach this ambitious goal. And in the spirit of radical transparency, we'll be keeping you updated on our progress along the way. "=" We are moving full speed ahead and bringing in the resources we'll need to take this campaign across the finish line. If we've proven anything this week, it's that our underdog campaign has a lot of fight left in it. Now let's go do something incredible. Cory "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. name: Michael (personal)
subject: truth teller
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team, I want to share a brief story with you. At the height of the Tea Party wave, I was up for my first election after being appointed.

In a year when many were wary of Obamacare and we saw backlash across the country, I went to the most conservative and rural areas in my state and held town halls to explain my vote.

[I didn't run away from conflict, I ran into it to stand my ground, because I knew I was making the right decision for kids and families. That's what I did as superintendent too, and it's what I'll do as president.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9eb/134673f2/9be6d71/6997af95/3225895103/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_112319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Our team has set an ambitious goal of raising another $100,000 over the next seven days, team. It will be a challenge, but I know we can get there with your help. Will you chip in and join this movement to rebuild our nation?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9eb/134673f2/9be6d71/6997af95/3225895103/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_112319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Mark Kelly wants the truth while McSally defends Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Democrat Mark Kelly has said from the beginning of the inquiry that the details surrounding Trump's dealings with Ukraine must be investigated. Meanwhile, GOP Senator Martha McSally joined Lindsey Graham, Mitch McConnell, and the rest of the corrupt Senate Republicans in condemning the House's impeachment investigation, refusing to hold the president accountable for his corrupt, backwards political dealings. She has chosen to continue down the hyper-partisan, Trump-supporting path that she has consistently campaigned that she is not on. She isn't working for her constituents or trying to bridge gaps with her colleagues \-- she's busy trying to shield Trump. Arizona voters are noticing \-- Democrat Mark Kelly has been making serious headway in flipping this critical Senate seat blue \-- and he's up 47 to 45 against McSally. _The Cook Political Report_ , _Inside Elections_ , and _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ have all placed the Arizona race firmly in the "Toss-Up" category. With her seat at risk, we know McSally will do anything, including cheating and breaking campaign finance laws, to win \-- because she's already been caught violating campaign finance laws **_multiple times!_** We're asking voters what they think about this race, and we need 117 more responses before MIDNIGHT: **Who do you support for U.S. Senate?** [Mark Kelly](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc33/6e9863e8/16beab37/1db0aa87/377561950/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/re2e-OlN") [Martha McSally](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc33/6e9863e8/16beab37/1db0aa87/377561950/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/re2e-OlN") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc33/6e9863e8/16beab37/1db0aa86/377561950/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyvmcsally-nd?refcode=OUT20191123a.ND-b&refcode2=sqgBSbFHCXD22lpweYLS")

name: Yang2020
subject: Take a stand for democracy: Add your name
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Countless people in this country are left without a voice -- the system is failing them.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3406%2E377263%2EgFK5zj) Yang Gang --

While we haven’t lived up to it, America’s democracy aspires to the idea that each citizen has an equal vote -- a say in who will represent them and their values in government.

The system should allow for each person’s voice to be heard and counted at the ballot box. **If the system is broken, we will end up with a government that doesn’t represent us, the American people -- and it will do nothing to benefit our everyday lives.**

Sound familiar?

That is why we are asking you to stand with Andrew in ensuring our voting system -- and thereby our democracy -- works for all Americans.

**[Please add your name now in support of Andrew’s Voting Rights Proposal to increase security, fight against voter suppression, increase access to the ballot box, and improve voter participation.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-votingrights-petition-20191120?source=email-20191123AM-all&t=6&akid=3406%2E377263%2EgFK5zj)** | [Add your name](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-votingrights-petition-20191120?source=email-20191123AM-all&t=9&akid=3406%2E377263%2EgFK5zj)
---
Countless people in this country are left without a voice -- the system is failing them. Due to a shortage of voting locations, elections being held during the work day, limited state resources, and restrictive voter registration requirements, a large part of America’s population is unable to make it to the ballot box.

Our democracy can and should work for each and every one of us. **It is our duty and our right to choose representatives who will speak up and fight for us.**

**[But it’s up to us -- we have the power, and we need to remind the rest of the country. We need to call out the issues that keep so many Americans’ voices silent in our government. Please, sign Andrew’s petition below to take a stand.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-votingrights-petition-20191120?source=email-20191123AM-all&t=8&akid=3406%2E377263%2EgFK5zj)**
[Add your name](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-votingrights-petition-20191120?source=email-20191123AM-all&t=7&akid=3406%2E377263%2EgFK5zj)
---
Thank you for lending your voice,

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17620?t=2&akid=3406%2E377263%2EgFK5zj)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=3406%2E377263%2EgFK5zj) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=3406%2E377263%2EgFK5zj) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

body:
---
| | Friends, this sickens me -- The Washington Post: Leaked Stephen Miller emails show Trump's point man on immigration promoted white nationalism, SPLC reports- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Friends, this sickens me -- [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b65/704929dc/166bc874/3990225d/4071029611/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMzQyMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/s/DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1") **White House senior adviser Stephen Miller has been the chief architect of this administration 's inhumane, xenophobic immigration agenda.** And now there's **over 900 emails** revealing that he worked closely with Breitbart News in the lead-up to the 2016 election to promote far-right extremist ideas, including white nationalist literature and anti-immigrant propaganda -- _but Trump and his administration continue to stand by him._ [**We have a moral responsibility to speak up for the most vulnerable among us. Stand against hatred: sign our urgent petition calling for Stephen Miller 's resignation!**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b65/704929dc/166bc874/3990225c/4071029611/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMzQyMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/s/DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=2+-+We+have+a+moral+responsibility+to+speak+&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1") | ****| ****| **[Add Your Name](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b65/704929dc/166bc874/3990225f/4071029611/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMzQyMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/s/DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=3+-+Add+Your+Name&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1")**
---
**Miller 's deeply racist beliefs have directly impacted the policies he's enacted to target our immigrant brothers and sisters.**
He is responsible for the unconstitutional travel ban on majority Muslim countries.
He is responsible for decimating our nation's refugee resettlement program and shutting the door on millions of families fleeing war, persecution, and other horrors.
He is responsible for the family separation policy that resulted in thousands of children being locked in cages, without access to basic hygiene or even a half-night's sleep -- _and the deaths of several children in custody._
[**Every day that he remains in the White House is a reckless failure to live up to a _basic_ human moral code. Add your name to say that the American people will not tolerate extremism and bigotry in our nation's government >>**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b65/704929dc/166bc874/3990225e/4071029611/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMzQyMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/s/DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=4+-+Every+day+that+he+remains+in+the+White+H&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1")
****| ****| **[Miller Must Resign](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b65/704929dc/166bc874/39902251/4071029611/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMzQyMjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/s/DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=5+-+Miller+Must+Resign&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_EN_191123_MillerMustResign_U1_X1")**
---
This hatefulness strikes at the very core of who we are as Americans and the values that we hold dear as a nation of immigrants. And we are going to do everything in our power to stop it.
We must speak out,
Wendy

This limited-time opportunity ends SOON, so be sure to claim your signed copy of my new book NOW. Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

| Team -- A quick update from Ed Markey's campaign:

We only have until midnight to close the gap on this week's goal, _**[and we need to ask if you will chip in $27 or more to help Ed win this primary race.](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112319_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Radicals SHUT DOWN college football game!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
“Climate change” protesters rushed the field this afternoon... and the liberals cheered them on! Read more >>
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | Peter, I'm shaking my head here. These people are nuts.

**" Climate change" protesters SHUT DOWN the Harvard-Yale football game this afternoon!**

They rushed the field at halftime, and refused to leave. For an entire hour, they carried on this ridiculous tantrum.
---
| [](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=57bd8a02fa943b6d3460b51dc71bd172e0862daa7f6bf28b4c847648c412b39ec682288ec768f62d26d14527a8fb4944d09287f9af308b04)
---
First, there's kneeling for the anthem. Now stunts like this.

Make no mistake about it, this is a result of liberal academia indoctrinating our kids. I guarantee you one thing, this would have never occurred when I was a head football coach.

This is what we're up against. These are the people we must defeat.

_**[Rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution to help!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=f6f6061afbe1be809bc1cc530c93754b4b68449fd41824f20eb9dab842e3eb0140d50351fa37b16c334da68cd95c27ab5c93449287fea9e2 "Rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution to help!")**_

It took police action to end this stunt. There were a number of arrests.

What's next? I'm sure they're busy now dreaming up the answer to that!

We can't let up in the fight for Alabama and America. _**[Tap or click to stand with me in our race for U.S. Senate](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=f6f6061afbe1be8061bede513b64342fb06c50a7cf6421b074451b9158e9ba63935a2f2a820c158dc120ea7a84ec10a968bab731278c775f "Tap or click to stand with me in our race for U.S. Senate")**_.

\- Coach

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: We can't let Kendra Horn have it both ways.
body:
Kendra Horn likes to pretend like she doesn't want impeachment, all while enabling Pelosi's show trial. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bea4cdbec869/calling-all-patriots-12050393?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=80559689a3&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=86f01a581c&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8dc2bb1e26&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter, This week, the Democrats pressed forward with their impeachment circus against President Trump.

They refuse to deal with real issues, like securing the border and reducing the debt, and instead push this partisan witch hunt. It's part of why I decided to run for Congress in the first place.

But it's important to realize how we got here.

Just a few weeks ago, Kendra Horn explicitly voted to authorize this sham impeachment inquiry. And in doing so she enabled Adam Schiff to use his congressional committee to harass the president all while denying Republicans and the president any due process rights.

This has always been a fishing expedition, and a Representative that respected her constituents' support for the president would not have voted to authorize it.

[**Will you donate $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 and help us throw Kendra Horn out of power? She had a chance to deliver for the American people and blew it.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=867b1a4837&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=78010f9169&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| The Associated Press has called Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020." National Journal said this is the **nation's #1 battleground district** , and Decision Desk HQ said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

The 5th Congressional District is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7d657a05ba&e=795c6d9796)

**[Will you contribute $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us take back the House for conservatives and give the president the support he needs in Congress?](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=272dd69116&e=795c6d9796)**

For Freedom,

[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a269fafafb&e=795c6d9796) Janet

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Help us protect emissions standards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump and his corporate cronies have taken these past three years to dismantle as many environmental regulations as possible in an effort to help big corporations pollute more and put profits over people. One of his latest rollbacks is removing California's right to set its own vehicle emissions standards \-- rules put in place to limit harmful emissions that California has been leading the country on. These emissions are harmful for so many reasons, namely that they contribute to climate change, worsen air pollution, and cause serious health conditions for children and elderly people. Trump wants to put more of these in the air, simply for the sake of saving a buck and helping out his millionaire friends. [**We won 't stand for this. If you believe that the White House needs to stop harming the environment, destroying a future for our children, and start caring about the American people, please add your name to our petition. We need as many Americans as possible to raise up their voices and push back against this sham of a government.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcce/6e9863e8/16b8f97e/1db0aa8b/2655091102/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/wdtop/") Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcce/6e9863e8/16b8f97e/1db0aa8b/2655091102/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/wdtop/")

name: Finance Team, MJ Hegar for Texas
subject: Before the turkey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We've got work left to do.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909aa/7f51f7bc/4b8d362c/4ef09c98/1882649672/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909aa/7f51f7bc/4b8d362c/4ef09c9f/1882649672/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=email_20191123.2nd__551__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Hey Peter,

I've got some good news and some bad news. (**Don 't have time to read the whole thing and just want to donate? Here's a special link: [https://www.mjfortexas.com/PreThanksgiving/Peter.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909aa/7f51f7bc/4b8d362c/4ef09c9f/1882649672/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=email_20191123.2nd__551__&amount=10&recurring=true")**)

First, the good news: We hit our October goal thanks to help from folks like you! I've gotta say, it felt pretty good to color in the thermometer on the wall we've been using to measure our progress. **It 's a huge deal for this team every time we hit a goal, because it's a tangible way to tell we are building the resources we need to beat Sen. Cornyn.**

But here's the bad news: Our November goal is even more ambitious -- it has to be if we're going to win this race. And look, we've set big goals in the past and reached them. But Thanksgiving is right around the corner, and folks will be tuning out this race in favor of family time, so we need to get a head start. **That 's why we're setting a Pre-Thanksgiving Goal of raising an additional $20,000 before the holiday.**

We know you'll probably be busy cooking or spending time with family on Thanksgiving Day itself, **[so can you pitch in right now to help us reach our Pre-Thanksgiving Goal before midnight tomorrow?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909aa/7f51f7bc/4b8d362c/4ef09c9f/1882649672/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=email_20191123.2nd__551__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks, Peter.

Taylor Klos
TX Finance Director

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909aa/7f51f7bc/4b8d362c/4ef09c9f/1882649672/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=email_20191123.2nd__551__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|

name: Gary Peters
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
I just wanted to take a moment to reach out and say thank you.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa90/5721a3ed/71f4912c/efa9c28/1495463964/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,

I just wanted to take a moment to reach out and say thank you. Thank you for all of your support thus far.
I've won tough elections before, and I'm all in to do it again this time around. With you on my team, I know we can win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats.

When we protect this seat, we'll be done with Mitch McConnell, and we'll protect the future of the Supreme Court. That means protecting everything from reproductive freedoms and affordable health care to voting rights and climate change. And that means no more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh.

But our path to victory won't be easy. Over the next several months, national GOP interests will continue to spend incredible amounts to defeat me and buy this seat. But I know we can win, and I'm grateful you're standing alongside me to keep Michigan blue.
Thank you, again - and all my best,
Gary
| | Gary Peters is just one of only two Democratic senators fighting to win in a state President Trump carried in 2016. And now, analysts at The Washington Post rank Gary as one of the most targeted senators in the country. Democrats cannot take back the Senate without winning in Michigan. Will you consider making your first contribution now so Gary can defend Michigan's Democratic Senate seat?

name: Nick Clemons, Team Kennedy
subject: Money doesn't make a movement. People do.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390947/55b66746/2c9a583b/80f1c3a/2599469692/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | First, I'm going to ask for you to support Joe. Then, I'm going to tell you why _your _individual contribution matters so much to this campaign. **[Donate $3 right now. Stand with Joe and let's take back the Senate.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390947/55b66746/2c9a583b/80f1c3b/2599469692/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-23-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** **Donors, not dollars. It's that simple.** Money doesn't make a grassroots movement. _People _do. **In the first 60 days of this campaign, Joe's visited 55 cities and towns, bringing folks into the fight for the communities that need their voices heard in Washington. **From homeless shelters to opioid clinics, our movement is showing up for those who continue to struggle in a society that continues to fail them. If we're going to win this, we need a historic movement of grassroots supporters. That's why we're putting every dollar toward building our movement: hiring staff, celebrating the best volunteers in the world, welcoming folks from all over the Commonwealth, and making sure our message gets out loud and clear. **We're coming up on another critical end of month deadline, and we're just 198 donations away from hitting our November goal of 1,500!** **[Chip in $3 today to get us there. | | The DNC has raised the requirements for the debate, yet again. There are only 19 days until the December debate qualifying deadline. [We just announced that we have less than 10,000 donors left to go to meet the unique donor threshold for the debate. You can be one of the critical donors that helps us get there! >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d4/3eb3e2fc/57ff2c19/744d4280/4087909475/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191123_em_fr_b1_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+We+just+announced+that+we+have+less+than&utm_campaign=20191123_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191123_em_fr_b1_castro_all") To make any movements in the polls, we need to expand our digital advertising to make sure that we get our message out to folks in Iowa, Nevada, and across the country. With billionaire candidates buying up so much space, these ads come at a premium. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d4/3eb3e2fc/57ff2c19/744d428b/4087909475/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191123_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191123_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d4/3eb3e2fc/57ff2c19/744d428a/4087909475/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191123_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191123_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). name: Cory Booker
subject: NEWS: I'm not a billionaire and I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
I don't think anyone should be able to buy an election.
| | |
---
| Yesterday, Michael Bloomberg announced that he's already committed $30 million on television ads across more than two dozen states. In fact, I want to share what _The New York Times_ wrote about this: _" The scope of Mr. Bloomberg's ad buy is staggering. It costs more than some smaller campaigns have spent all year on advertising, and more than what Senator Cory Booker had raised in donations from February through the end of September."_ [**Please, consider donating right now so our campaign will be able to compete against the unlimited money coming into this race.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191123_CB_20191123-fr-CB-MB-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I want to be honest about something: We are never going to be able to match dollar-for-dollar the spending of someone like Michael Bloomberg. Truthfully, we won't be able to spend tens of millions on TV ads anytime soon. But, what we can do is make smart and strategic decisions with the resources that we have. When you're an underdog, sometimes that's just the way it has to be. **We set an end-of-month goal of $1.5 million because that 's what we believe we need to make the important investments we need to win. [If you're with me, chip in $5 now so we can keep growing this underdog campaign.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191123_CB_20191123-fr-CB-MB-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **I don't think anyone should be able to buy an election.** Every race I've won was through hard work and meeting people where they are -- one block, one neighborhood, one community at a time. I am so, so humbled that thousands of Americans have decided to donate to this campaign. We're united in our belief that the only way to heal our country after Donald Trump is to bring people together to deliver real justice and opportunity for all. Friends, I mean it when I say that there's no other team I'd rather have by my side on this journey. I'm proud to be an underdog in this fight. Now, let's power this grassroots campaign to victory.**[I hope you'll join me.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191123_CB_20191123-fr-CB-MB-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191123_CB_20191123-fr-CB-MB-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d0d/5fca0d19/795bc92e/291c574f/1167825579/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d0d/5fca0d19/795bc92e/291c574e/1167825579/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d0d/5fca0d19/795bc92e/291c574d/1167825579/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d0d/5fca0d19/795bc92e/291c574c/1167825579/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d0d/5fca0d19/795bc92e/291c574b/1167825579/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d0d/5fca0d19/795bc92e/291c574f/1167825579/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Nikki Foster
subject: We're better than this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf19/30a4f917/50916813/28cec25e/4266555201/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_EN_191123_DACA_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_EN_191123_DACA_U1_X1")

| | The Supreme Court just heard arguments to decide the future of hundreds of thousands of young adults -- immigrants who have only ever known the United States as their home. If the Supreme Court sides with Donald Trump and ends the DACA (Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals) program, their entire lives will be thrown into jeopardy. They could be facing immediate deportation. My parents were immigrants who came to this country in search of the American dream. They worked hard every single day to make a better life for our family, and they taught me so much about the value of hard work. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - The Supreme Court just heard arguments to decide the future of hundreds of thousands of young adults -- **immigrants who have only ever known the United States as their home.** If the Supreme Court sides with Donald Trump and ends the DACA (Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals) program, **their entire lives will be thrown into jeopardy**. They could be facing immediate deportation. My parents were immigrants who came to this country in search of the American dream. They worked hard every single day to make a better life for our family, and they taught me so much about the value of hard work. **I 'm proud of my immigrant heritage** \-- immigrants are a crucial part of the United States, and they make our country a better place with everything they contribute to our culture, education and communities. Donald Trump has shown a disgusting and unwarranted contempt for immigrants. [**I 'm asking you to join me in urging the Supreme Court not to let Donald Trump end DACA ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf19/30a4f917/50916813/28cec251/4266555201/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_EN_191123_DACA_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+asking+you+to+join+me+in+urging+&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_EN_191123_DACA_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_EN_191123_DACA_U1_X1") | | | [Protect DACA](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf19/30a4f917/50916813/28cec250/4266555201/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_EN_191123_DACA_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Protect+DACA&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_EN_191123_DACA_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_EN_191123_DACA_U1_X1")
---
DACA has overwhelming support -- the majority of Americans support allowing children brought here at a young age to remain in the country.
**A recent poll showed public support for the program at a whopping 83%.**
**We need to look at these young adults with compassion and understanding.** They are just as American as you or I. This is their home.
I've had enough of immigration policies that treat children with such cruelty. That is not the America that I fought overseas for -- I fought for our freedom, our values, and our compassion.
We're better than this. [**The Supreme Court must protect DACA -- add your name if you agree ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf19/30a4f917/50916813/28cec253/4266555201/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_EN_191123_DACA_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4+-+The+Supreme+Court+must+protect+DACA++add&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_EN_191123_DACA_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_EN_191123_DACA_U1_X1")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: GOP voter suppression in these critical states could guarantee Trump victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, In Texas, the GOP-controlled state legislature passed a law that shuttered early polling stations at campuses across the state, early polling stations where tens of thousands of ballots have been cast in past elections. In Florida, Republicans are trying to subvert a voter-approved ballot measure giving ex-felons the right to vote. And in Georgia, the Republican Secretary of State announced plans to purge 330,000 MORE voters from their records \-- the same state that Stacey Abrams lost the gubernatorial election by less than 2% of the vote. The GOP knows that it doesn't have any good ideas to convince people to vote for Republican candidates, so instead they have to keep people from voting in the first place. If we're going to have a fair chance at taking back the Senate and the White House, everyone who is eligible to vote needs the chance to \-- and we HAVE to stop the GOP from cheating. When Democrats Turn Out is committed to ensuring that everyone can vote, but we need to hear from you on this critical issue: **Will you vote in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf0/6e9863e8/16ba2ccc/1db0aa8c/1710719990/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ohTQKD8-x") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf0/6e9863e8/16ba2ccc/1db0aa8c/1710719990/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ohTQKD8-x") Thanks for your support. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf0/6e9863e8/16ba2ccc/1db0aa93/1710719990/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191123c.ND-b&refcode2=i7gM9txSvKp1bN6nhumo")

name: Ed Markey
subject: We're coming up short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

We're at 89% of our $25,000 end-of-week goal, but time is running out to make up those last donations.

_**[Will you rush $27 or more to my campaign by clicking here?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112319_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

That's why your donation is so important. _**[Please, chip in $27 or more to my campaign and help keep us in the fight for our progressive values.](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112319_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Ed

name: Tina Smith
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Before I ask you to consider contributing to our campaign for Senate, let me tell you why this request is so important.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191123-oneweek?refcode=em191123-oneweek&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

One week from today, we will close the books on our fundraising for November. But before I ask you to consider contributing to our campaign for Senate before the deadline, let me tell you why this request is so important.

If we reach our goal for the month, we will be in a position to build a _winning_ campaign that can overcome the likes of Mitch McConnell, my opponent, Jason Lewis, and their special-interest allies next year. We will keep Minnesota blue. And we will bring Democrats one step closer to the majority.

But if we fall short, we risk falling behind in our re-election race and wiping away virtually any chance Democrats have at taking back the Senate. This is the worst-case scenario, but it's a very real possibility.

The bad news is we are not where we need to be to hit our target for the month. But the good news is we have a few days left to get back on track. So, here's the part where I ask for your help:

**Do you think you could add a donation -- of any amount -- to my re-election campaign before our end-of-month deadline? Even a gift of $10 would make a big difference in catching us up to our goal.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191123-oneweek?refcode=em191123-oneweek&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191123-oneweek?refcode=em191123-oneweek&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191123-oneweek?refcode=em191123-oneweek&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191123-oneweek?refcode=em191123-oneweek&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191123-oneweek?refcode=em191123-oneweek&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191123-oneweek?refcode=em191123-oneweek&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
I don't say this lightly, but this is a critical moment for our campaign. We need to hunker down to reach this grassroots goal because we cannot afford to fall short -- not this early in our race.

If we have the resources needed to win this election, then there's nothing anyone -- from Mitch McConnell to wealthy special interests -- can do to stop us. I hope my team and I can count on you.

Thanks for everything.

-- Tina

| | Where is the urgency? **In this country:** \- Hundreds of thousands are sleeping on the street.
\- Rents are skyrocketing.
\- Homeownership is a fantasy for far too many. **This is a problem that can be solved, but not nearly enough is being done to solve it.** [DONATE NOW](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d5/3eb3e2fc/5785bab3/744d4c3a/4143791326/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191123_em_fr_b2_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+NOW&utm_campaign=20191123_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191123_em_fr_b2_castro_all") As HUD Secretary we made great strides to promote fair housing practices, make homeownership more affordable, and curb rising rents. In Trump's administration, these efforts have been stalled. We need an even greater effort nationwide, and it will take presidential leadership. As a candidate, I have put forth plans and have aggressively fought to bring attention to this crisis. Unfortunately, many keep putting this critical issue on the backburner. I need your help to keep pushing.
